creator: roland@micite.net
text:
(In reply to William Grzybowski from comment #0)
Is there an action required from me?

The patch seems good,
1) Change the pkg-descr WWW: to https://github.com/andialbrecht/sqlparse
2) Might as well move directly to 0.1.15
SHA256 (sqlparse-0.1.14.tar.gz) = ce92c9f134b1cd461a27c502197464b5f245261ad0fbb26d7bf659f28a5c11b2
SIZE (sqlparse-0.1.15.tar.gz) = 57863

Regards,

Roland
